title: Earth Tribe Award
description: The Earth Tribe Award is about helping us understand more about protecting our world. Find out how you can be a planet champion!

tips.title: Buy your Earth Tribe Award from Scout Store.
tips.details: Once you have completed your pathway you can order your Earth Tribe Award from [Scout Store.](https://shop.scouts.org.uk/new-in/scouts-section-earth-tribe-award-badge#selection.size=719&selection.color=34)

tips.title: You only need to complete one pathway to earn your award, but you can complete all the pathways multiple times.
The Earth Tribe Award pathways follow a similar structure to the Community Impact Staged badges, so you can draw on past experiences.
Uniform and badge placement
tips.details: The Earth Tribe Award goes on your right arm, under the District and County/Area/Region badges.

image.alt: Earth Tribe badge for the Scout section, which is round with colourful shapes and the World Scout logo in the middle.
